title: Milestone 2 — .pi/prompts/supervise.md

success_criteria.verify: agents.actors() lists supervisor, security-advisor, architecture-advisor with extensions:false, model openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol, thinking max, tools read/grep/find/ls
capture IDs from first run; second run returns identical IDs with no agents.create calls

success_criteria.criterion: Resume restores actors with correct immutable fields
success_criteria.verify: fresh session /supervise resolves or recreates with canonical fields; no immutable drift

success_criteria.criterion: Second concurrent session gets distinct IDs
success_criteria.verify: two sessions' agents.actors() lists are disjoint by ID

success_criteria.criterion: Supervisor instructions contain no self-stop directive
success_criteria.verify: rg -n "Goal verified complete|stop" .pi/prompts/supervise.md returns no supervisor self-stop text
fault-inject wrong tools value; /supervise removes + recreates and reports remediation

tasks.title: Author custom supervisor instruction text
tasks.end_state: Supervisor instructions written with no self-stop, no readiness certification, silent-by-default directive contract.
verification: rg -n "Goal verified complete" .pi/prompts/supervise.md returns no matches in supervisor-instruction block
instruction block has action:"silent" default and forbids action:"stop"

tasks.title: Author security + architecture advisor instruction text
tasks.end_state: Both advisor instructions written, mailbox-only, domain-scoped, no steer-direct, no stop.
verification: both advisor blocks contain mailbox-only, stay silent outside your domain, never steer Main directly

tasks.title: Author the idempotent create-or-inspect algorithm
tasks.end_state: Prompt contains resolve-by-name -> create-or-compare -> fail-closed-on-immutable-mismatch -> update-mutable flow using locally-resolved IDs only.
depends_on: Author security + architecture advisor instruction text
verification: fault-injected immutable mismatch -> remove + recreate reported, not silent reuse

tasks.title: Validate prompt frontmatter + auto-discovery
tasks.end_state: File has description (+ optional argument-hint) frontmatter and no agent routing or pseudo-tool calls.

open_questions: Should /supervise accept an inspect-only mode (no create)?
Confirm worktree:false acceptable for read-only persistent actors (assumed yes)
Exact advisor instruction wording finalized at ship time (draft in spec)
